comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed semantic-release standardization scope for platform-ci: reusable workflow delivered, documentation added, and branch-protection bypass IaC aligned for bot-driven release pushes.

issues.title: Provide reusable semantic-release workflow and branch-protection compatibility

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating GH013 push rejections in Tactus and Virtuus after migration to reusable semantic-release workflow; implementing auth hardening to ensure semantic-release pushes are attributed to anthusbot bypass actor.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated .github/workflows/semantic-release-reusable.yml to enforce anthusbot credentials during checkout and git push path resolution. Changes: checkout now uses anthusbot token with persisted credentials; release auth step clears any GitHub extraheader and forces both origin fetch/push URLs to x-access-token remote.

issues.title: Harden reusable semantic-release auth to enforce anthusbot identity

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated README with reusable semantic-release workflow usage, required secrets, inputs, outputs, and invocation guidance for downstream repositories.

issues.title: Document reusable semantic-release workflow usage in README

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed initial standardization milestone in platform-ci and validated downstream adoption path for Tactus and Virtuus via the shared release workflow.

issues.title: Standardize semantic release automation for protected main branches

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting implementation: add reusable workflow to compute/update coverage badge from a CI artifact and document caller setup in README.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented reusable coverage badge workflow and docs updates. Added .github/workflows/coverage-badge-reusable.yml (workflow_call) to download a caller CI coverage artifact, generate coverage_badge.json from totals.percent_covered, and push badge updates with anthusbot credentials. Updated README.md with setup, inputs, required secret, and caller examples.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Investigating code-scanning bot feedback on PR #6: reproduce finding context, assess exploitability/risk, and patch workflow if warranted.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Code-scanning finding investigated and addressed. The alert flagged trusted-context checkout of caller-provided ref in the coverage badge reusable workflow. Remediation: removed the checkout_ref input and all caller-controlled ref checkout logic; workflow now always checks out origin/release_branch before generating and committing badge updates.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Expanding security investigation to additional code-scanning alerts #3 and #1; will triage each alert and remediate reusable workflow patterns where needed.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Remediated code-scanning alerts #3 and #1 in semantic-release reusable workflow. Removed caller-provided checkout_ref input and now always checkout origin/release_branch in privileged context. Replaced install_command command-string execution with semantic_release_requirement passed as quoted pip argument to eliminate expression-based command execution.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: User requested no deprecation compatibility. Proceeding with strict contract only and updating all local caller workflows to match.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Applied strict hardening for semantic-release reusable workflow to address code-scanning alerts: removed checkout_ref and install_command inputs entirely, enforced checkout from origin/release_branch in privileged context, and replaced command-string install with quoted semantic_release_requirement pip argument. Updated README caller example accordingly.

issues.title: Add reusable coverage badge workflow and documentation

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented reusable workflow at .github/workflows/semantic-release-reusable.yml with workflow_call inputs/secrets, bot-authenticated push setup, semantic-release version execution, and release outputs (released/tag/version).

issues.title: Implement reusable semantic-release workflow for repository consumers

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated infra/github-rulesets/main-branch-protection.json to include anthusbot bypass actor (ID 266826422) with always bypass mode for release automation compatibility.

issues.title: Update main branch protection IaC to allow anthusbot release bypass
